init.title: Asset Intelligence Settings
init.description: Configure default labels and document management behavior.

data_description.default_label_ids: Select labels that should be applied automatically to new assets.
data_description.documents_enabled: Enables document storage and management features.
data_description.document_storage_path: Enter a folder path that Home Assistant can access. When a valid path is provided, document management is enabled automatically.

error.path_required: A document storage path is required when document management is enabled.
